prompt_inputs.goal: Prepare for marathon race in 2 weeks with optimized energy and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre/post-training snacks with appropriate timing
Macronutrient distribution supports endurance training (55-60% carbs, 15-20% protein, 20-25% fat)
All meals are easily digestible and account for training schedule
Respects dietary restrictions (vegetarian, nut-free) throughout all meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) with high caloric needs and specific macronutrient ratios, requiring meals that balance energy density with digestibility before/after training
